message:
fix(command_guard): tighten regex boundaries and clean up SPMC ring buffer style

Command guard regex fixes (command_guard.rs):
- RM_RF_SAFE: replace trailing word boundary \b with
  \s*(?:;|$|&&|\|\||\||\n) to prevent false matches when a safe
  directory name appears as a prefix of a longer path (e.g.
  "rm -rf ./target" should not match "rm -rf ./target_production")
- GIT_PUSH_FORCE_LEASE: tighten regex to only match within a single
  command using [^;&|\n]* boundaries to prevent cross-command false
  positives in multi-command strings (e.g. "echo foo; git push
  --force" should not match on the echo part)

SPMC ring buffer cleanup (spsc_ring_buffer.rs):
- Replace manual if/panic patterns with idiomatic assert!() calls
  in SpmcProducer::push_to_all() — functionally identical, just
  cleaner Rust style
- Increase test channel capacity from 8 to 16 in
  spmc_broadcasts_to_all_consumers_in_order to validate ordering
  without backpressure interference

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
